This repository will not always be fully vibe-coded make sure that code is readable for humans.
Use an object oriented programming style.
Keep functions short (no longer then 15 lines outside the docstring), and focused on a single task.
Classes should be focused on a single responsibility and not be too large (no more than 200 lines).
Use descriptive names for variables, functions, and classes.
Programming constructs (classes, functions, methods) should be ordered from highest level the top of a file to the lowest level at the bottom of the file.
